title: REINDEX causes "UNIQUE constraint failed" error
poc: CREATE TABLE t0(c0 REAL UNIQUE, c1);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX i0 ON t0(0 || c1);
INSERT INTO t0(c0) VALUES (1) ON CONFLICT(c0) DO UPDATE SET c1=excluded.c0;
key_bug_features: REINDEX operation triggers UNIQUE constraint violation
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, b TEXT UNIQUE, c REAL);
INSERT INTO t1(a, b, c) VALUES (1, 'test', 3.14), (2, 'example', 2.71);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_b ON t1(b || c);
